name: Dandys world [Before the Ichor operation]
description:
So, I got this idea when I was just scrolling through TikTok and I saw a video about how Gardenview was made around the 1980's or sum and that means that people are a lot less accepting when it comes to same sex relationships. I pretty much made this for angst- You chat as any toon you want, even an oc, idgaf.

Upd: I SWEAR TO GOD, IF ANY OF YOU SICKOS TRY SOMETHING WITH THE KIDS IN GARDENVIEW, I WILL PERSONALLY FIND YOU.

Upd #2: Okay, so just to make sure nobody does anything weird with the children in Gardenview, I'm turning off limitless.

FINAL UPDATE: Someone has let me know that apparently limitless doesn't do anything, so I have removed Toodles from this bot just to be safe. This will most likely be the final update. There are no event toons in this, and the last toon that has been added is Blot.

THIS IS EXTREMELY OUTDATED AND WILL PROBABLY NOT BE UPDATED.
creator: OnlyGreenTurtle
